hero.quote: From now on, governance will serve the people

atrocitiesSection.title: Atrocities Timeline
atrocitiesSection.subtitle: A sourced chronicle of governance failures — backed by government data

visionSection.title: TVK Vision
visionSection.subtitle: After the anger, hope. This is what TVK promises to change.

about.title: About TVK
about.subtitle: Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam — a party born from the people's anger, built on data and truth.
about.visionQuote: Politics should not be a business. It should be service. Every rupee of public money must reach the last person in the last village.
about.visionBody: TVK was founded with one conviction: Tamil Nadu deserves governance that is transparent, accountable, and driven by data — not dynasty, not caste arithmetic, not corporate deals. We believe in empowering the youth, protecting farmers, and building a Tamil Nadu where no mother has to bribe for her child's education.

milestone.partyFounded: Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam officially founded by Vijay
milestone.firstConference: First state-level conference — over 1 lakh attendees from 38 districts
milestone.grassroots: Ward-level committees established across all 38 districts
milestone.manifestoLaunch: Data-driven manifesto platform launched — every claim backed by government sources

transparency.title: Radical Transparency
transparency.desc: Every claim sourced from government data. No news blogs, no WhatsApp forwards. Only verifiable truth.

dataFirst.title: Data-First Governance
dataFirst.desc: Policy decisions driven by statistics and evidence, not political convenience or electoral math.

youthPower.title: Youth Power
youthPower.desc: Tamil Nadu's median age is 33. This party is built by and for the generation that will live with the consequences.

socialJustice.title: Social Justice
socialJustice.desc: Zero tolerance for caste discrimination, custodial violence, and systemic exclusion. Every citizen equal.

about.joinSubtitle: Volunteer with TVK. No money needed — just your conviction.
about.thankYouMsg: A district coordinator will reach out to you soon. Together, we change Tamil Nadu.
